title: Silky's PvP Optimized
description: A ModPack made for the best PvP experience, with good performance and useful quality-of-life improvements.
body:
# ⚔️ Silky's PvP Optimized - Modpack

**Silky's PvP Optimized** is a carefully assembled Minecraft modpack designed to provide the **best possible PvP experience** while maintaining **excellent performance and useful combat-focused quality-of-life improvements**.

Instead of spending hours searching for individual mods, configuring them, and checking compatibility, this modpack bundles **everything you need for competitive Minecraft combat in one place.**

Whether you're playing on PvP servers, practicing, or grinding ranked matches, this modpack aims to make combat **smoother, clearer, and more informative.**


## 🚀 Performance Improvements

This modpack includes several well-known **performance optimization mods** to ensure Minecraft runs smoothly even during intense combat situations.

Some of the major optimization mods included are:
- ⚡ **Sodium**
- 🌟 **Sodium Extras**
- 🌀 **FerriteCore**
- 🕸️ **Entity Culling**
- ⚙️ **Lithium**
- 💡 **ScalableLux**
- 🖱️ **Lxeris**
- 🛠️ And so much more optimization mods!

Together, these improvements significantly **boost FPS, reduce lag spikes, and improve overall game responsiveness**, which is extremely important in PvP scenarios.


## 🗡️ PvP Tweaks, Utilities & Quality of Life

Silky's PvP Optimized also includes **many PvP-focused utility, information and quality-of-life mods** that enhance the combat experience.

These include features such as:

- 👁️ Combat clarity improvements
- ⚡ Utility tweaks for better gameplay
- 🎯 Combat Information Huds
- 🧰 Small interface improvements
- 🛡️ PvP helper utilities
- 🔧 Various client-side optimizations used by top tier players

The goal is simple: **make PvP smoother, clearer, and more easier while keeping it in one downloadable modpack**


## 🎨 Recommended Resource Pack - Silky's Default PvP

For the **complete PvP experience**, it is highly recommended to use the resource pack
[Silky's Default PvP](https://modrinth.com/project/fc6Bhl8S)

This resource pack adds essential visual tweaks commonly used in PvP, such as:
- 🔥 Low fire
- 🌫️ Reduced particles
- 📦 Smaller utilities
- 👀 Cleaner visuals for combat
- ✨ Other PvP-focused tweaks

When **Silky's PvP Optimized + Silky's Default PvP** are used together, you get **every essential tweak needed for smooth and better competitive Minecraft combat and SMP Gameplay.**


## ⚠️ Important Disclaimer (Server Rules)

Some PvP-focused utility mods included in this modpack **may be restricted or banned on certain servers or PvP tierlists**. e.g. Marlow's Crystal Optimizer, Consumable Optimizer, Anchor Optimizer.

Before playing on any server, **please check the server's rules or tierlist guidelines,** and simply disable the disallowed mods accordingly 

You are responsible for ensuring that your client setup **complies with the server's rules.**


## 📦 Minecraft Version Support

Currently, the modpack is available only for:

**Minecraft 1.21.11**

Since this modpack is maintained **all by myself**, updates take a long time.

However, if the modpack receives enough support, it will soon receive support for **all Minecraft 1.21.x versions.**


## 📜 Mod Ownership

None of the mods included in this modpack are created or owned by me.

All credit goes to the **original developers of each mod**.
The respective mod creators **retain full rights and ownership over their work.**

This modpack simply **packages and configures these mods together.**


## 💬 Reporting Issues & Suggestions

If you encounter any issues, or have suggestions for improvements, please let me know.

You can:

- Join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uczvEgWfsK) and report the issue there (mention me so I can see it quickly)
- Or **DM me directly on Discord**. My Discord Username: sillyapr1l

Feedback helps me improve the modpack and ensures it stays stable and useful for everyone.


## ⭐ Why Use This Modpack?

- 🚀 Better FPS and performance
- ⚔️ PvP-focused quality-of-life improvements
- 🧰 Useful combat utilities/info huds
- 🎯 Clean and optimized gameplay experience
- 📦 Everything bundled in one convenient download

No more hunting for dozens of separate mods.
**Install once and get going!**
